Danina La
Local Guide · 473 reviews · 2,783 photos






6 months ago
Amazing!! Super friendly staff and this must be one of the best gelateria in Malcesine. 2€ per scoop, descending if you take more than one. I highly recommend the flavor 'Pino pinguino', never seen it before and it was amazing!

Like

Share
Response from the owner a week ago
Hi Danina, thank you so much! We are thrilled you enjoyed our friendly staff and the "Pino Pinguino" flavor. Hope to see you again in Malcesine soon! Fabrizio

Jana G
Local Guide · 87 reviews · 206 photos






6 months ago
A lovely little ice cream shop located up by the castello in Malcesine. We visited every night during our stay because it was just so good! We really enjoyed the brownie flavor, mango, yogurt and also pistachio was good!

Like

Share
Response from the owner a week ago
Hi Jana, thank you for visiting us every night! We are thrilled you loved our brownie, mango, yogurt, and pistachio flavors. Hope to welcome you back to Malcesine soon. Fabrizio
